deals.name: Seiko SRPD65 'Pepsi' Diver
deals.note: The blue-and-red 'Pepsi' bezel variant of the Seiko 5 Sports — same movement, bolder look. Usually $20 more than the standard variants and worth it.

deals.name: Tissot PRX Quartz
deals.note: Same integrated bracelet look as the Powermatic 80 at exactly half the price. Get this if the movement doesn't matter to you — the design is identical.

deals.name: Hamilton Certified Pre-Owned
deals.note: Hamilton runs a certified pre-owned program directly — serviced, warrantied, and 35–40% off new. Worth checking before buying new.
